controls if the target application can be modified by Dynamic Instrumentation
contains the environment that this application will run under
controls if the OpenTelemetry Logs SDK pipeline should be enabled
specifies the name of this application
holds a set of service mappings to dynamically rename services
controls if trace IDs are generated as 128-bits or 64-bits

Datadog trace protocol version
trace agent URL resolved from DD_TRACE_AGENT_URL, DD_AGENT_HOST, DD_TRACE_AGENT_PORT
enables debug logging
controls if the tracer should log when old, open spans are found
enables the collection of debug stack traces globally
specifies any enabled feature flags
directory for tracer logs
whether the tracer should enable partial flushing
peer service name mappings
specifies the rate limit per second for traces
indicates whether hostname should be reported on spans
interval between agent connection retries
holds the sample rate for the tracer
automatically assigned from OS hostname or DD_TRACE_SOURCE_HOSTNAME
span attribute schema version (0 or 1)
when true, causes various startup info to be written when the tracer starts
enables client-side stats computation (aka trace metrics)

resolved OTLP trace headers
